blocks.text: This slice closes `Q-DIST-001` for the Mac App Store external provider CLI strategy.

items: Claude, Codex, OpenClaw, and Cursor CLIs are external user-installed tools.
The Store App must never bundle, download, install, or silently update provider CLIs.
`mac-app-store` provider CLI execution requires both `StoreChannelPolicyInput.OSGrantPresent=true` and `StoreChannelPolicyInput.StoreReviewApproved=true`.
If either proof is missing, the provider may be detected or shown as login-required/store-blocked, but C4 must not spawn it.
Public CI verifies the `Q-DIST-001` closure in the C11 distribution-host SSOT.
Executable paths, bookmark bytes, entitlement proof, signing secrets, and live submission evidence remain local/private.
